title: TimeSeries
description: A time series in Cognite Data Fusion represents a sequence of data points in time order, either numeric or string values.

id.description: A server-generated ID for the object.

externalId.description: The externally supplied ID for the time series.

instanceId.description: Reference to a Data Modeling instance.

name.description: The display short name of the time series.

isString.description: True if the time series contains string values; false if it contains numeric values.

type.description: The data type of the data points.

metadata.description: Custom, application specific metadata. String key -> String value.

unit.description: The physical unit of the time series (free-text field).

unitExternalId.description: The physical unit of the time series as represented in the unit catalog.

assetId.description: Asset ID of equipment linked to this time series.

isStep.description: Defines whether the time series is a step series or not.

securityCategories.description: The required security categories to access this time series.

dataSetId.description: The ID of the dataset this time series belongs to.

createdTime.description: The number of milliseconds since epoch (Unix timestamp).

lastUpdatedTime.description: The number of milliseconds since epoch (Unix timestamp).
